onboarding.welcome_subtitle: A quieter way to see where your money goes.
onboarding.pick_source_title: Where should we get your data?
onboarding.pick_source_subtitle: Pick one. You can change this later.
onboarding.source_synthetic_body: 90 days of realistic spending. Best for first look.
onboarding.source_monobank_body: Paste your personal token. EU and Ukraine.
onboarding.monobank_explainer: Generate a personal token at https://api.monobank.ua/. We never store the token in plaintext or send it anywhere except monobank's API.
onboarding.monobank_invalid_token: That doesn't look like a 44-character monobank token.
onboarding.monobank_token_rejected: monobank rejected the token. Generate a new one.
onboarding.monobank_rate_limited: monobank is rate-limiting us. Try again in a minute.
onboarding.csv_explainer: Export your transactions from your bank's website as CSV. Max 5MB.
onboarding.csv_too_large: File is over 5MB. Try a smaller export.
onboarding.csv_unparseable: Couldn't read this file. Please check the format.
onboarding.csv_mapping_failed: Couldn't find the date/amount/merchant columns. Manual mapping comes in a future update.
onboarding.csv_no_rows_imported: No transactions imported. Categories may be missing.
